question: I think you are irregular in studies. Be attentive lest —

options.a: you will fail in the exam
options.b: you should fail in the exam
options.c: you do not fail in the exam

explanation: 'Lest' যুক্ত বাক্যে structure হলো: lest + subject + should/might + verb-এর base form। এখানে 'should fail' সঠিক।

question: Jamil had an accident yesterday while he —
explanation: 'While' এর ঠিক পরে subject থাকলে সাধারণত past continuous tense হয়। যেহেতু দুর্ঘটনাটি অতীতে (yesterday) ঘটেছিল, তাই 'was crossing' সঠিক।

question: Corruption is a bottleneck to our national development. It is high time —
explanation: 'It is high time' এরপর subject থাকলে verb-এর past form (V2) বসে। তাই 'checked' সঠিক।

question: Had I been a millionaire, —

options.c: I would have helped the poor

explanation: এটি 3rd Conditional (Had + Subject + V3)। এর পরবর্তী অংশে subject + would have/could have + V3 বসে।

question: Whenever he speaks in English, —. In fact, we learn through mistakes.
explanation: Whenever সাধারণত চিরন্তন সত্য বা অভ্যাস বুঝাতে Present Simple tense গ্রহণ করে। পরের বাক্যে 'learn' (present) থাকায় এখানে 'makes' সঠিক।

question: Danger comes where —. So, we have to be careful in our life.
explanation: এটি একটি বিখ্যাত প্রবাদ (Proverb): 'Danger comes where it is feared' (যেখানে বাঘের ভয় সেখানেই রাত হয়)।

question: It was many years since we —
explanation: 'Since' এর প্রথম অংশ Past Indefinite হলে পরের অংশ Past Perfect হয়। তাই 'had met' সঠিক।

question: Had I got a helicopter, —

options.a: I would fly in the sky
options.b: I would have flown in the sky
options.c: I will fly in the sky
options.d: I shall fly in the sky

explanation: এখানে 'Had I got' (Had + Sub + V3) হলো 3rd conditional, তাই structure অনুযায়ী 'would have flown' বসবে।

question: Rahim Mia is a quack. He behaves as if —
explanation: 'As if' বা 'As though' এর আগে Present Indefinite থাকলে পরে Past Indefinite (be verb হলে were) বসে।

question: Don't waste time. Go hurry lest —
explanation: Lest-এর নিয়মানুযায়ী Subject (you) + should + Verb-এর base form (miss) ব্যবহৃত হয়েছে।

question: Wait until —. You should not go out alone.
explanation: 'Until' যুক্ত clause-টি সাধারণত Present Indefinite হয় যদি আগের অংশটি Imperative বা Future হয়।

question: The patient was so serious and we were looking for a doctor. Alas! The patient had died before —
explanation: Before-এর আগে Past Perfect (had died) থাকলে পরে Past Indefinite (came) বসে।

question: The train will start at 10 a.m. Now it is 09:55 a.m. So, walk fast lest —
explanation: Lest-এর পর subject + should/might বসে। এখানে 'should miss' সবচেয়ে উপযুক্ত।

question: Ayesha is a bright student. She studies hard so that —

options.a: she may make a good result
options.b: she could make a good result
options.d: she might make a good result

explanation: 'So that' এর আগের অংশ Present tense (studies) হলে পরের অংশে Subject + can/may + V1 বসে।

question: Had you sought my help, —
explanation: Had + Subject + V3 দিয়ে বাক্য শুরু হলে তা 3rd conditional, তাই 'would have + V3' হবে।

question: The men, who love their country, —
explanation: এখানে subject 'The men' প্লুরাল, তাই verb 'are' হবে এবং এটি প্যাসিভ ভয়েসে আছে।

question: The beggar was very hungry. No sooner had he got a piece of loaf on the road than —

options.c: he had begun to eat it
options.d: he was beginning to eat it

explanation: No sooner had... than-এর পর Past Indefinite tense (V2) বসে। তাই 'began' সঠিক।

question: My brother will come to Rajshahi from Dhaka. So, I have to go to station with a view to —
explanation: 'With a view to' এর পর verb-এর সাথে 'ing' যুক্ত হয়। তাই 'receiving' সঠিক।

question: I wish I —. I would express my feelings in my poems.
explanation: অসম্ভব ইচ্ছা প্রকাশ করতে 'I wish' এর পর 'were' বসে।

question: It is too late. — we would not have missed the train.
explanation: পরের অংশে 'would not have missed' (3rd conditional) থাকায় আগের অংশটি If + Past Perfect হতে হবে।

question: The poem is too difficult for —
explanation: Too + adjective + for + personal object + to + V1 — এই গঠন অনুযায়ী 'me to understand' সঠিক।

question: Despite —, he helps his relatives.
explanation: Despite-এর পর noun phrase বা possessive + V-ing বসে। 'his poverty' (তার দারিদ্র্য সত্ত্বেও) অর্থপূর্ণ।

question: He took Logic — History. History seems to be difficult to him.
explanation: ইতিহাসের পরিবর্তে সে লজিক নিয়েছে, তাই 'instead of' (পরিবর্তে) সঠিক।

question: Overeating is harmful to health. It is high time —
explanation: 'It is high time' এরপর subject থাকলে verb-এর past form হয়।

question: No sooner had I reached the college —
explanation: No sooner had...-এর সাথে correlative হিসেবে 'than' বসে।

question: In spite of having all facilities, the boy —
explanation: 'In spite of' বিপরীত অর্থ প্রকাশ করে। সব সুবিধা থাকা সত্ত্বেও সে সফল হতে পারেনি।

question: Unity is strength. United we stand, —
explanation: এটি একটি প্রবাদ: 'United we stand, divided we fall' (একতাই বল, বিভেদেই পতন)।

question: If I had the wings of a bird, I —
explanation: এখানে 'had' মূল verb হিসেবে আছে (Past Indefinite), যা 2nd Conditional। তাই 'would + V1' হবে।

question: John is fond of reading. Whenever he goes to the book fair, —
explanation: অভ্যাসগত কাজ বুঝাতে 'whenever' এর সাথে Present Indefinite ব্যবহার করা হয়।

question: Would you mind —? I am very thirsty.

options.a: to give me a glass of water
options.b: giving me a glass of water

explanation: 'Would you mind' এর পর verb-এর সাথে 'ing' যুক্ত হয়।

question: Air is polluted in many ways. It is high time —
explanation: It is high time + subject + V2 (past form) নিয়ম অনুযায়ী 'prevented' সঠিক।

question: He wrote very quickly. He had finished the exam before the —
explanation: Before-এর আগে Past Perfect থাকলে পরে Past Indefinite (V2) হয়।

question: A village doctor is a person who —. He is the best friend to the villagers.
explanation: সাধারণ পরিচয় বা পেশা বুঝাতে Present Indefinite tense ব্যবহৃত হয়।

question: Scarcely had the teacher entered the classroom —
explanation: Scarcely had... এর সাথে 'when' বসে।

question: The load is so heavy that —
explanation: So + adjective + that + sub + cannot/could not + V1। যেহেতু 'is' present, তাই 'cannot carry it' সঠিক।

question: I went to the library with a view to —
explanation: With a view to + (verb+ing) নিয়ম অনুযায়ী 'reading' সঠিক।

question: Strike the iron —
explanation: এটি একটি প্রবাদ: 'Strike the iron while it is hot' (ঝোপ বুঝে কোপ মারা)।

question: Five years passed since —
explanation: Since-এর আগের অংশ Present Perfect বা Present Indefinite হলে পরের অংশ Past Indefinite হয়।

question: The box is very heavy. Are you strong enough —?
explanation: Adjective + enough + to + V1 — এই গঠন অনুযায়ী 'to carry it' সঠিক।

question: Had I seen him, —

options.a: I would tell him the news
options.b: I would have told him the news
options.c: I will tell him the news

explanation: 3rd Conditional (Had + Sub + V3) এর নিয়ম অনুযায়ী 'would have + V3' হবে।

question: Unless you work hard, —
explanation: Unless (যদি না) নেতিবাচক অর্থ দেয়। কঠোর পরিশ্রম না করলে তুমি সফল হতে পারবে না।

question: Walk fast lest —
explanation: Lest-এর পরে subject + should বসে।

question: It is high time we — our habits.
explanation: It is high time-এর পর subject থাকলে past indefinite tense হয়।

question: Many years have passed since —
explanation: Since-এর আগে Present Perfect থাকলে পরে Past Indefinite হয়।

question: If you provided the information, I — the report.
explanation: If + Past Indefinite (provided) থাকলে পরের অংশে would + V1 বসে (2nd Conditional)।

question: As he was ill, —

options.b: he could not attend the meeting
options.c: he will not attend the meeting
options.d: he does not attend the meeting

explanation: আগের অংশটি Past Tense (was) হওয়ায় পরের অংশটিও Past Tense (could not) হবে।

question: Wait here until —
explanation: Until যুক্ত অংশটি সাধারণত Present Indefinite হয়।

question: Though he is poor, —
explanation: Though/Although বিপরীত অর্থ প্রকাশ করে। সে গরীব হলেও সৎ।

question: He speaks as if —
explanation: As if-এর আগে Present Indefinite থাকলে পরে Past Indefinite হয়।

question: He ran fast so that —
explanation: So that-এর আগে Past Indefinite (ran) থাকলে পরে subject + could/might + V1 বসে।

question: The box is too heavy for the old man —
explanation: Too + adjective + for + person + to + V1। মনে রাখতে হবে, বাক্যের শুরুতে object (The box) থাকলে শেষে পুনরায় 'it' ব্যবহারের প্রয়োজন নেই।

question: 1971 is the year when —
explanation: অতীতের কোনো নির্দিষ্ট সাল বা সময় বুঝাতে 'when' এর পর Past Indefinite tense বসে।

question: A newspaper is a storehouse of knowledge. A man can be benefited in many ways —
explanation: পন্থা বা মাধ্যম বুঝাতে 'by + gerund' (by reading it) ব্যবহার করা সবচেয়ে উপযুক্ত।

question: Student politics, nowadays, has become a serious issue. It is high time we —
explanation: It is high time + subject + V2 (past form) নিয়ম অনুযায়ী 'banned' সঠিক।

question: A book fair is an attraction for the city-dwellers. Book-lovers gather in the fair so that —
explanation: 'So that' এর আগে present tense (gather) থাকলে পরে subject + can/may + V1 বসে।

question: Success depends on the proper use of time. You will surely succeed provided that —
explanation: 'Provided that' অর্থ 'যদি' (if)। এটি 1st conditional হিসেবে কাজ করে, তাই পরের অংশ Present Indefinite হবে।

question: Time plays a very crucial role in human life. We cannot prosper in life unless —

options.a: we make the best use of time
options.b: we do not make the best use of time
options.c: we made the best use of time
options.d: we will make the best use of time

explanation: 'Unless' মানে 'যদি না'। এটি নিজেই নেতিবাচক, তাই এর পরের অংশে 'not' বসে না।

question: His only daughter lives in Canada. It is many years since —
explanation: Since-এর আগে Present Indefinite/Perfect থাকলে পরে Past Indefinite (saw) হয়।

question: To tell a lie is a bad habit. The cowboy was used to —
explanation: 'Be used to' (was used to) এর পর verb-এর সাথে 'ing' যুক্ত হয়।

question: Eve-teasing is a heinous crime. It is high time we —
explanation: It is high time-এর পর subject থাকলে verb-এর past form হয়।

question: My brother had no job then. He went to Dhaka with a view to —
explanation: With a view to + (verb+ing) নিয়ম অনুযায়ী 'finding' সঠিক।

question: Trees are essential for our existence. So, —
explanation: উপদেশ বা প্রয়োজনীয়তা বুঝাতে should, must বা can সবই ব্যবহার করা যেতে পারে।

question: Wait until —. You should not go out alone.
explanation: Until যুক্ত clause সাধারণত Present Indefinite হয়।

question: Love is divine. You can't find others to love you unless —
explanation: Unless নিজেই negative অর্থ বহন করে, তাই এর সাথে নতুন করে 'not' দরকার নেই।

question: Punctuality is a great virtue. So try —
explanation: Try-এর পর সাধারণত infinitive (to + V1) বসে।

question: Everybody must be conscious of health because —
explanation: চিরন্তন সত্য (Universal Truth) সবসময় Present Indefinite হয়।

question: Corruption is a hindrance to national development. It is high time —
explanation: It is high time + sub + V2।

question: Patriotism is a noble virtue. It is high time —
explanation: It is high time-এর পর Subject থাকলে V2 হয়, আর সরাসরি Verb বসলে 'to + V1' হয়। এখানে দুটিই গ্রামাটিক্যালি সঠিক।

question: Hasan got GPA 4.50. Had he studied seriously he —
explanation: Had + Sub + V3 (3rd conditional) থাকলে পরের অংশে would have + V3 বসে।

question: Time is valuable. Those who waste time —
explanation: যারা সময় নষ্ট করে তারা জীবনে সফল হতে পারে না—এটি একটি সাধারণ সত্য।

question: This ceiling is not so high. He is tall enough —
explanation: Adjective (tall) + enough + to + V1। এখানে 'touch it' বলা যায় কারণ ceiling-টি নির্দিষ্ট।

question: Lock the door and keep the key in a safe place lest —
explanation: Lest-এর নিয়ম: subject + should/might + V1।

question: You cannot understand everything clearly unless —
explanation: Unless-এর পর clause-টি affirmative হয় এবং অর্থ অনুযায়ী present tense বসে।

question: In spite of facing so many drawbacks in life, he — ultimately.
explanation: In spite of (সত্ত্বেও) বিপরীত অর্থ দেয়। অনেক বাধা থাকা সত্ত্বেও সে শেষ পর্যন্ত সফল হয়েছিল।

question: Freedom is man's birthright. He is born free but everywhere —
explanation: এটি রুশোর একটি বিখ্যাত উক্তি। বর্তমান অবস্থা বুঝাতে Present Indefinite হয়।

question: A man leading an indolent life —
explanation: অলস ব্যক্তি উন্নতি করতে পারে না—এটি একটি চিরন্তন সত্য।

question: Be punctual in your studies —
explanation: পাছে বা ভয়ে বুঝাতে 'lest' ব্যবহার করা হয়।

question: Food adulteration is a crime. It is high time —
explanation: HSC standard-এ 'It is high time' এরপর Subject থাকলে V2-ই সবচেয়ে গ্রহণযোগ্য।

question: The old man is very weak. He is walking slowly —

options.b: so that he can fall down

explanation: পড়ে যাওয়ার ভয়ে সে আস্তে হাঁটছে। Lest + sub + should/might + V1।

question: A student should not memorize any answer blindly. If he memorizes the answer without knowing the meaning, —
explanation: If + Present Indefinite (1st conditional) হলে পরের অংশ Future Indefinite (will + V1) হয়।

question: Had I earned enough money —

options.b: I would have established a hospital

explanation: Had + Subject + V3 (3rd conditional)।

question: There was a little rain yesterday. If it had rained heavily, —

options.b: we would not have gone out

explanation: 3rd conditional: If + had + V3, subject + would have + V3।

question: Though junk foods look appetizing, —. We should avoid them.
explanation: Though-এর পরের অংশ আগের অংশের বিপরীত অর্থ দেয়। দেখতে লোভনীয় হলেও এগুলো অস্বাস্থ্যকর।

question: Opportunity does not always come. You would have succeeded in life provided that —
explanation: যেহেতু বাক্যের শুরুতেই 'would have succeeded' (3rd conditional) আছে, তাই provided that (if) এর পরে Past Perfect বসবে।

question: The amount of waste is growing rapidly all over the world and polluting the environment. It is high time —
explanation: It is high time + subject + V2।

question: English is an international language. We need to learn it as —

options.a: it helps us get a good job

explanation: As (যেহেতু) যুক্ত বাক্যে কারণ দর্শানো হয়েছে।

question: Kiran got a foreign scholarship. She was so happy that —
explanation: So + adjective + that + subject + V2 (যেহেতু 'was' অতীতে)।

question: Manners define a man. We always appreciate a person —
explanation: A person (singular) এর জন্য relative pronoun 'who' এবং singular verb 'has' বসবে।

question: The martyrs laid down their lives in 1971. They did it so that —
explanation: So that-এর আগের অংশ Past Indefinite (did) হলে পরে subject + could/might + V1 বসে।

question: The thief was afraid of police. He ran away lest — arrested.
explanation: Lest-এর পরে subject + should + be (passive sense)।

question: If I had been hungry, —. But I am not hungry at all.
explanation: 3rd Conditional: If + had + V3 (had been), subject + would have + V3।

question: Honesty is the best policy. The people who are honest —
explanation: 'The people' plural subject, তাই verb 'are' হবে।

question: Because of greenhouse effect, the climate —
explanation: জলবায়ু পরিবর্তনের প্রক্রিয়াটি চলমান, তাই Present Continuous (is changing) সবচেয়ে সঠিক।

question: There goes a proverb that morning —
explanation: এটি প্রবাদ: 'Morning shows the day' (উঠন্ত মূলো পত্তনেই চেনা যায়)।

question: I work hard although —
explanation: Although বিপরীত অর্থ দেয়—ক্লান্ত হওয়া সত্ত্বেও কাজ করছি।

question: There are so many poor people in our country. I wish —
explanation: I wish-এর পর কাল্পনিক সামর্থ্য বুঝাতে 'could + V1' বসে।

question: The old man — is my grandfather.
explanation: Subject-এর পরিচয় দিতে Relative Clause (who is walking) ব্যবহৃত হয়েছে।

question: Unity is strength. United we stand, —
explanation: এটি প্রবাদবাক্য।

question: John is fond of reading. Whenever he goes to the book fair, —
explanation: Whenever অভ্যাস বুঝাতে Present Indefinite গ্রহণ করে।

question: Rima is a good singer. She sings so well that —
explanation: So + adverb + that + Present Indefinite ফলাফল বুঝাতে ব্যবহৃত হয়েছে।

question: Since Bangladesh is an agricultural country, —. We should put emphasis on our agricultural sectors.

options.c: our economy will depend on it
options.d: our economy has depends on it

explanation: যেহেতু এটি একটি বর্তমান সাধারণ সত্য (General Truth), তাই Present Indefinite tense ব্যবহার করতে হবে।

question: There is a wise saying that united we stand, —. So, we must be united.
explanation: এটি একটি বিখ্যাত প্রবাদ (Proverb): 'United we stand, divided we fall' (একতায় উত্থান, বিভেদে পতন)।

question: Industry is the key to success. We work hard so that —
explanation: 'So that' এর আগের অংশ Present tense (work) হলে পরের অংশে Subject + can/may + V1 বসে।

question: My younger brother is very fond of me. Whenever I go out, —

options.a: he wants to go with me
options.b: he wanted to go with me
options.c: he will want to go with me
options.d: he has wanted to go with me

explanation: Whenever সাধারণত নিত্যনৈমিত্তিক কাজ বা অভ্যাস বুঝাতে Present Indefinite tense গ্রহণ করে।

question: Bangladesh is my motherland. It is blessed with rivers. In spite of that, we do not get water during dry season because —
explanation: শুষ্ক মৌসুমে নদী শুকিয়ে যাওয়া একটি নিয়মিত কারণ, তাই Present Indefinite tense সঠিক।

question: If we lose the morning hours of life, —

options.a: we will suffer in the long run
options.b: we would suffer in the long run
options.d: we suffer in the long run

explanation: এটি 1st Conditional (If + Present Indefinite)। এর পরের অংশে Subject + shall/will + V1 বসে।

question: I can't recall his name. It is long since —
explanation: 'Since' এর প্রথম অংশ Present Indefinite হলে পরের অংশ Past Indefinite (V2) হয়।

question: The poem is too difficult —. The teacher told us to listen to him very carefully.
explanation: Too + adj + for + object + to + V1 গঠন অনুযায়ী 'for us to understand' সঠিক।

question: My childhood was full of joys and happiness. Would that —

options.a: I could be a child again
options.c: I can be a child again

explanation: 'Would that' দিয়ে অসম্ভব ইচ্ছা প্রকাশ করা হয়। এর পরে subject + were অথবা subject + could + V1 বসে।

question: We met the strange person while —

options.a: we were walking in the park

explanation: While এর পর সরাসরি verb থাকলে 'ing' হয়, আর subject থাকলে Past Continuous হয়। এখানে দুটিই সঠিক।

question: We take physical exercise so that —
explanation: সোজা নিয়ম: So that + subject + can/may + V1 (যদি আগের অংশ present হয়)।

question: Prosperity does not come in one's life automatically. If —, you can't prosper in life.
explanation: শর্ত বুঝাতে If + Present Indefinite নেতিবাচক অর্থে ব্যবহৃত হয়েছে।

question: Time is very important in our life. You can't succeed in life unless —

options.a: you make the best use of time
options.d: you made the best use of time

explanation: Unless (যদি না) নিজে নেতিবাচক, তাই এর সাথে নতুন করে 'not' বসে না।

question: He wrote very quickly. He had finished the exam before the —
explanation: Before এর আগে Past Perfect (had finished) থাকলে পরে Past Indefinite (rang) বসে।

question: Early rising gives a man enough free time. Had I been an early riser, —

options.a: I would have enjoyed the morning air
options.b: I would enjoy the morning air
options.c: I will enjoy the morning air
options.d: I could enjoy the morning air

explanation: 3rd Conditional (Had + sub + V3) এর পরের অংশে would have + V3 বসে।

question: There is nobody —. Hence happiness is a relative term.
explanation: Nobody সিঙ্গুলার, তাই relative pronoun 'who' এর পর সিঙ্গুলার verb 'is' বসবে।

question: I worked hard although —
explanation: Although (যদিও) বিপরীত বৈপরীত্য প্রকাশ করে। ক্লান্ত হওয়া সত্ত্বেও কঠোর পরিশ্রম করেছি।

question: The crown is a symbol of a king. Uneasy lies the head —
explanation: এটি শেক্সপিয়ারের বিখ্যাত উক্তি। Head (মাথা) বস্তুবচক হওয়ায় 'that' ব্যবহার করা হয়েছে।

question: Man proposes, —
explanation: এটি একটি প্রবাদ: 'Man proposes, but God disposes' (মানুষ ভাবে এক, হয় আর এক)।

question: Traffic jam in Dhaka has been unbearable these days. Had I got a Helicopter, —

options.a: I would fly to my office
options.b: I would have flown to my office
options.c: I will fly to my office
options.d: I could fly to my office

explanation: Had + sub + V3 (3rd conditional) এর নিয়ম অনুযায়ী 'would have flown' সঠিক।

question: Human body needs a balanced diet. If we take a balanced diet, it —
explanation: If + Present (take) হলে পরের অংশে Future Indefinite (will keep) বসে।

question: It is my dream to establish a hospital for the poor. Had I been a millionaire, —
explanation: আবারও ৩য় শর্ত (3rd Conditional) এর প্রয়োগ।

question: English is an international language. If you do not learn English, —

options.a: you cannot get a good job
options.b: you could not get a good job
options.c: you will get a good job
options.d: you do not get a good job

explanation: বাস্তব ফলাফল বুঝাতে Present Indefinite এর সাথে can/cannot ব্যবহার করা যায়।

question: The rats are now thinking who will tie the bell on cat. Finally they realize it is easy to say —
explanation: এটি প্রবাদ: 'It is easy to say but difficult to do' (বলা সহজ কিন্তু করা কঠিন)।

question: Sharing is —. So, teach your children how to share.
explanation: প্রবাদ অনুযায়ী 'Sharing is caring' সবচেয়ে জনপ্রিয়, তবে গ্রামাটিক্যালি বাকিগুলোও সঠিক।

question: The train will start at 10 a.m. Now it is 09:55 a.m. So, walk fast lest —
explanation: Lest এর পর should বা might উভয়ই গ্রামাটিক্যালি সঠিক।

question: A lot of passengers were waiting at the bus stop. A bus came. But the bus was so small that —

options.a: it could not hold all the passengers
options.b: it cannot hold all the passengers
options.c: it could hold all the passengers

explanation: So + adj + that + sub + could not + V1 (যেহেতু বাক্যটি past tense-এ আছে)।

question: He, who — makes a glorious result in the examination.
explanation: He (singular) এর জন্য relative pronoun 'who' এর পর সিঙ্গুলার verb (studies) বসবে।

question: Whenever he speaks in English, —. In fact, we learn through mistakes.
explanation: বর্তমান অভ্যাস বুঝাতে Present Indefinite tense ব্যবহৃত হয়েছে।

question: Danger comes where —. So, we have to be careful in our life.
explanation: প্রবাদ: 'Danger comes where it/danger is feared' (যেখানে বাঘের ভয় সেখানেই রাত হয়)।

question: Scarcely had the party begun —
explanation: Scarcely had... এর সাথে correlative হিসেবে 'when' বসে।

question: Wait here until —
explanation: Until নিজে negative, তাই এর ভেতরে 'not' বসে না এবং এটি Present Indefinite হয়।

question: It is high time you — for the HSC exam.
explanation: It is high time + sub + V2 (past form)।

question: If I were a bird, —

options.a: I would fly in the sky
options.b: I will fly in the sky

explanation: 2nd Conditional (If + sub + were) এর পরে would/could + V1 বসে।

question: Though he is a small boy, —
explanation: Though বৈপরীত্য বুঝায়। ছোট হওয়া সত্ত্বেও সে শক্তিশালী।

question: I would rather die —
explanation: Would rather... than একটি নির্দিষ্ট গঠন যা দুটি কাজের মধ্যে একটিকে বেছে নিতে ব্যবহৃত হয়।

question: The load is so heavy that —
explanation: So + adj + that + sub + cannot + V1 (Present tense এর ক্ষেত্রে)।

question: He speaks as if —
explanation: As if এর আগে Present Indefinite থাকলে পরে অবাস্তব অবস্থা বুঝাতে 'were' বসে।

question: The man is so old that —
explanation: Present tense-এ 'so...that' এর পর cannot + V1 বসে।

question: As you have made a mistake, —
explanation: কারণ ও ফলাফল বুঝাতে উপদেশ হিসেবে 'should' ব্যবহৃত হয়েছে।

question: Wait until the rain —
explanation: Until যুক্ত ক্লজটি Present Indefinite হয়।

question: Scarcely had I reached the station —
explanation: Scarcely...when একটি নির্দিষ্ট জোড়া (correlative)।

question: No sooner had he seen the police —
explanation: No sooner had... এর সাথে 'than' বসে।

question: It is high time we — our environment from pollution.
explanation: It is high time-এর পর subject থাকলে V2 হয়।

question: If you had worked hard, —
explanation: 3rd Conditional এর নিয়ম: If + Past Perfect, sub + would have + V3।

question: I wish I — a poet.
explanation: অসম্ভব ইচ্ছা প্রকাশে 'I wish' এর পর 'were' বসে।

question: He ran away lest he —
explanation: Lest + subject + should + V1 (passive হলে be + V3)।

question: Knowledge is power. The more you read, —
explanation: The more... the more একটি সমান্তরাল গঠন (parallel structure)।

question: Health is wealth. We should take balanced diet so that —
explanation: So that + sub + can/may + V1।

question: A friend in need —
explanation: এটি অতি পরিচিত প্রবাদ: 'A friend in need is a friend indeed' (অসময়ের বন্ধুই প্রকৃত বন্ধু)।

question: A student should be regular in his studies. If he is not, —

options.a: he will fail in the exam
options.b: he would fail in the exam

explanation: If + Present Indefinite হলে ফলাফল বুঝাতে Future Indefinite (will + V1) বসে।

question: He is very miserly. He spent money as if —

options.c: he had been a rich man

explanation: 'As if' এর আগে Past Indefinite (spent) থাকলে পরে Past Perfect (had been) বসে।

question: I have no money. I would rather starve —
explanation: 'Would rather... than' এর পর verb-এর base form বসে।

question: The boy was so weak that —
explanation: আগের অংশ Past (was) হওয়ায় পরের অংশে 'could not' ব্যবহৃত হবে।

question: We should not ignore our duties. We must work hard lest —
explanation: 'Lest' যুক্ত বাক্যে structure হলো: subject + should/might + V1।

question: Bangladesh is a land of beauty. It is high time —
explanation: 'It is high time' এর পর subject থাকলে V2 হয়, আর সরাসরি verb থাকলে 'to + V1' হয়।

question: Books are our best friends. Reading books with a view to — is a great habit.
explanation: 'With a view to' এর পর verb-এর সাথে 'ing' যুক্ত হয়।

question: My father is very strict. He behaves as though —
explanation: 'As though' এর আগে Present Indefinite থাকলে অবাস্তব কল্পনা বুঝাতে পরে 'were' বসে।

question: I don't know why he is absent. Had I known his address, —
explanation: 3rd Conditional (Had + Sub + V3) এর নিয়ম অনুযায়ী 'would have + V3' হবে।

question: Unity is a must. If you do not remain united, —
explanation: If + Present Indefinite (1st Conditional) এর পরবর্তী অংশে Future Indefinite হয়।

question: Rony is very meritorious. He had passed the exam before —
explanation: 'Before' এর আগে Past Perfect থাকলে পরে Past Indefinite (প্যাসিভ হলে were + V3) হয়।

question: Scarcely had the teacher entered the room —
explanation: Scarcely had... when জোড়া শব্দ হিসেবে ব্যবহৃত হয়।

question: Wait until —. I am coming soon.
explanation: 'Until' এর পর clause টি affirmative হয় এবং Present Indefinite tense হয়।

question: A friend in need —. It is a very common proverb.
explanation: প্রবাদবাক্য: A friend in need is a friend indeed (অসময়ের বন্ধুই প্রকৃত বন্ধু)।

question: Though he is rich, —. He always thinks about money.
explanation: 'Though' বৈপরীত্য বুঝায়। ধনী হওয়া সত্ত্বেও সে অসুখী।

question: He ran away for fear that —
explanation: 'For fear that' এবং 'Lest' একই অর্থ বহন করে, যার পর should/might বসে।

question: The sum is too hard —
explanation: Too + adj + for + person + to + V1। এখানে শেষে it প্রয়োজন নেই।

question: Whenever he speaks, —. It's really annoying.
explanation: অভ্যাস বুঝাতে Whenever এর সাথে Present Indefinite হয়।

question: No sooner had the thief seen the police —
explanation: No sooner had... than একটি গ্রামাটিক্যাল গঠন।

question: If I had seen him, —

options.a: I would have given him the letter
options.b: I would give him the letter
options.c: I will give him the letter

explanation: 3rd Conditional এর নিয়ম অনুযায়ী would have + V3 বসে।

question: Honesty is a great virtue. You will be respected provided that —
explanation: 'Provided that' (যদি) এর পর Present Indefinite ব্যবহৃত হয়।

question: I was not hungry. If I had been hungry, —
explanation: অতীতের কোনো অসম্ভব শর্ত বুঝাতে 3rd Conditional ব্যবহৃত হয়।

question: The patient died after —
explanation: 'After' এর আগে Past Indefinite থাকলে পরে Past Perfect হয়।

question: It is many years since —
explanation: 'Since' এর আগে 'It is' থাকলে পরে Past Indefinite (V2) হয়।

question: Had I been a king, —

options.a: I would have helped the poor

explanation: Had + Sub + V3 দিয়ে ৩য় শর্ত বুঝানো হয়েছে।

question: The tea is too hot —
explanation: গঠন: Too + adj + for + person + to + V1।

question: He has failed. He would have passed if —
explanation: Would have passed থাকলে ইফ ক্লজটি Past Perfect (had studied) হতে হবে।

question: He acts as if — everything.
explanation: 'As if' এর আগে present থাকলে পরে past indefinite হয়।

question: Scarcely had the bell rung —

options.a: when the students left the class
options.b: than the students left the class
options.c: then the students left the class
options.d: before the students left the class

explanation: Scarcely এর সাথে when-এর সম্পর্ক চিরস্থায়ী।

question: I would rather die —
explanation: পছন্দ প্রকাশ করতে 'Would rather... than' বসে।

question: Unless you speak the truth, —
explanation: সত্য না বললে শাস্তি পাবে—এটিই স্বাভাবিক পরিণতি (Unless + Present, Future)।

question: It is high time you — your career.
explanation: 'It is high time' এর পর V2 বসে।

question: Walking is a good exercise. We should walk so that —
explanation: So that + sub + can/may + V1।

question: I went to the market with a view to — a shirt.
explanation: With a view to-র পর verb-এর সাথে ing যুক্ত হয়।

question: If you came, —
explanation: If + Past Indefinite থাকলে would + V1 হয় (2nd Conditional)।

question: Wait here until the rain —
explanation: 'Until' এর পর Present Indefinite হয়।

question: No sooner had I reached the station —
explanation: No sooner had... than নিয়মটি সঠিক।

question: As he was ill, —

options.a: he could not go to school
options.c: he will not go to school
options.d: he did not go to school

explanation: যেহেতু তিনি অসুস্থ ছিলেন, তিনি স্কুলে যেতে পারেননি (Past sense)।

question: Walk fast lest —
explanation: Lest + sub + should + V1।

question: Though he worked hard, —
explanation: বিপরীত অর্থ: কঠোর পরিশ্রম করা সত্ত্বেও সে ফেল করেছে।

question: If I were you, —

options.c: I would not have done this

explanation: ইফ ক্লজটি past হলে পরেরটি would + V1 হয়।

question: I wish I — a king.
explanation: I wish এর পর were বসে।

question: Knowledge is power. The more you read, —
explanation: The more... the more একটি প্রবাদসম নিয়ম।

question: It is high time we — our bad habits.
explanation: It is high time-এর পর V2 ব্যবহৃত হয়।

question: Had I enough money, —

options.b: I would have helped the poor

explanation: এখানে 'Had' মূল verb (V2) হিসেবে আছে, তাই এটি 2nd Conditional। ফলে 'would + V1' হবে।

question: He speaks as though —
explanation: 'As though' এর আগে present থাকলে পরে past indefinite হয়।

question: I would rather take coffee —
explanation: দুটি জিনিসের মধ্যে একটিকে বেছে নিতে Would rather... than ব্যবহৃত হয়।

question: It is ten years since —
explanation: Since-এর প্রথম অংশ present হলে পরের অংশ past indefinite হয়।

question: Unless you work hard, —
explanation: শর্ত ও ফলাফল: কাজ না করলে সফল হতে পারবে না।

question: A friend in need —
explanation: প্রবাদবাক্যটি পূর্ণ করা হয়েছে।

question: A student should be sincere. He must study hard with a view to —
explanation: 'With a view to' একটি phrase যার পর verb-এর সাথে 'ing' যুক্ত হয়।

question: He is so foolish that —. We cannot expect any wise decision from him.

options.b: he could not understand the matter

explanation: 'So + adjective + that' এর পর negative sense বুঝাতে present tense-এ cannot + V1 বসে।

question: The sky is cloudy. It may rain today. You had better — an umbrella.
explanation: 'Had better' এর পর verb-এর base form (V1) বসে।

question: He has a lot of money, but he is a miser. He would rather die —
explanation: 'Would rather... than' কাঠামোতে দুটি কাজের মধ্যে তুলনা বুঝাতে base form ব্যবহৃত হয়।
